name: type:bug
description: Something is broken or behaves wrong

name: type:enhancement
description: Improvement to something that already exists

name: type:tech-debt
description: Code quality / refactor with no user-visible change

name: priority:P0-now
description: Drop everything. Prod broken or data at risk

name: priority:P2-later
description: Planned but not urgent (default for new issues)

name: area:workout-logging
description: Active workout flow, set logging, rest timer UI

name: area:history
description: History tab, past sessions, calendar heatmap

name: area:rest-timer
description: Rest timer logic, notifications, Live Activity

name: area:onboarding
description: First-launch flow, empty states, Sign in with Apple

name: status:blocked
description: Waiting on an external dependency or decision

name: good first task
description: Small, self-contained — a good warmup ticket

name: discussion
description: Needs a decision before work begins
